LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: PLAINTIFF DID NOT GIVE PROPER NOTICE THAT HE WILL APPEAR TO CONTEST THE TENTATIVE RULING AND NO VALID PROOF OF SERVICE WAS PRESENTED TO THE COURT. THEREFORE, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF MICHAEL LOGWOOD'S MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL IS OFF CALENDAR. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976.

calendar.matters:
Motion To Vacate Dismissal
Off Calendar Jul-29-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael Anthony Logwood, Tel. 415.912.6415, plaintiff appearing on his own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: Plaintiff did not give proper notice that he will appear to contest the tentative ruling and no valid proof of service was presented to the Court. Therefore, the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF MICHAEL LOGWOOD'S Motion To Vacate Dismissal is off calendar. No proof of service filed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
